title: pedicularis myriophylla var. myriophylla
intro: Pedicularis myriophylla var. myriophylla, commonly known as Chinese Pedicularis, is a plant species in the family Orobanchaceae, characterized by its unique, leafy stems and small white or purple flowers. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to clear heat, detoxify, and reduce inflammation. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Pedicularis myriophylla var. myriophylla is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is also dried and used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and decoctions.
